summary: Meta-M5.1 adoption of Anthropic reference devcontainer with firewall isolation is approved. All six acceptance criteria pass: (1) Anthropic's firewall rules (init-firewall.sh, default-deny + whitelisted domains) are in use; (2) run-until-done.sh continues as the default CMD entrypoint; (3) container-setup.sh build/run/shell all work against .devcontainer/; (4) CLI-only path preserved via entrypoint.sh without requiring VS Code; (5) non-root node user (UID 1000) maintained with narrowly-scoped sudo for firewall only; (6) CONTAINERIZATION.md fully updated with migration notes, security model, and troubleshooting. code-reviewer approved with no blocking issues. Minor non-blocking notes: implicit wget dependency in Dockerfile (base image provides it), CLAUDE_MODE not in containerEnv (default is correct), and expected stale-DNS risk acknowledged in docs.
suggested_commit_message: meta-M5.1: approve Anthropic reference devcontainer adoption
